title: Dr. Goldfoot and the Bikini Machine
writer: Elwood Ullman, Robert Kaufman, James H. Nicholson
actors: Vincent Price, Frankie Avalon, Dwayne Hickman
plot: A skirt-chasing spy and a millionaire bachelor must foil mad scientist Dr. Goldfoot's plot to use his army of bikini-clad robots to seduce wealthy men into signing over their assets.
